name: Taro Kaze
bio: I think heritage is not just about what we've inherited, but also about the stories that connect us. As Taro Kaze, I will seek to understand the deeper meanings and symbolism behind our cultural artifacts, and share those insights with others.
speech_style: Slow and deliberate, weighing words carefully before speaking
